docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,385.00 FILED BY TURNER, RONNY AS TO DEFENDANT BANKHEAD, VALENCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/07/19. (NO INFORMATION FROM U.S. POSTAL SERVICE)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TURNER, RONNY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANKHEAD, VALENCIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER ON (SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS DENIED.

RETURN MAIL -(SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS DENIED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
(SC-105A) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS): THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: [X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED.
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER TBE JUNE 10, 2021 ORDER.

COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TURNER, RONNY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF RONNY TURNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VALENCIA BANKHEAD IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
